metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE workflow for compliance evidence collection and validation, tailored for a Latin American enterprise compliance lead, using the market_lens to handle high-urgency, low-context inputs with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE workflow for compliance evidence collection and validation, tailored for a Latin American enterprise compliance lead, using the market_lens to handle high-urgency, low-context inputs with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Workflow processes at least 10 high-urgency, low-context inputs without failure.; Each input is routed through at least 3 validation gates (context completeness, regulatory match, evidence quality).; Final artifact includes all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.; Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail logs for audit.

in_scope.item: The workflow ingests messy, high-urgency compliance evidence requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), processes them through structured validation gates, and produces a governed artifact compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Workflow processes at least 10 high-urgency, low-context inputs without failure.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Each input is routed through at least 3 validation gates (context completeness, regulatory match, evidence quality).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Final artifact includes all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail logs for audit.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.workflow_objective: Build an SRX ACE workflow for compliance evidence collection and validation, tailored for a Latin American enterprise compliance lead, using the market_lens to handle high-urgency, low-context inputs with explicit validation gates.

workflow_phases.item: The workflow ingests messy, high-urgency compliance evidence requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), processes them through structured validation gates, and produces a governed artifact compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

validation_gates.item: Workflow processes at least 10 high-urgency, low-context inputs without failure.
Each input is routed through at least 3 validation gates (context completeness, regulatory match, evidence quality).
Final artifact includes all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.
Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail logs for audit.

receipt_contract.item: sections: objective; scope; constraints; success_criteria; output_contract

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
